title: ollama/ollama
summary: Official Ollama repo—CLI and server to pull, run, and manage GGUF models locally with a built-in model library and OpenAI-compatible API.

title: ollama-python
summary: Official Python client/SDK for Ollama; chat, embed, pull, and manage models with a few lines of code.

title: ollama-js
summary: Official JavaScript/TypeScript client for Node and browsers; same API surface as the Python SDK.

title: langchain-ollama
summary: LangChain integration package letting you swap Ollama models into any LangChain chain or agent.

title: ollama-webui
summary: Clean open-source ChatGPT-style web UI that talks to a local Ollama instance over its REST API.

title: ollama-cli
summary: Community-enhanced interactive CLI with conversation history, context pinning, and prompt templates.

title: ollama-helm
summary: Production-ready Helm chart for running Ollama on Kubernetes with GPU autoscaling and PVC model cache.

title: ollama-compose
summary: Docker-Compose stack adding Open-WebUI, Weaviate vectorDB, and nginx in front of Ollama for a full RAG setup.

title: ollama-copilot
summary: GitHub Copilot-like VS-Code extension that uses local Ollama models for inline code completions and chat.

title: ollama-rag
summary: Minimal Retrieval-Augmented-Generation template using Ollama + Chroma + LangChain in a single notebook.

title: ollama-gpt4all
summary: GPT4All now offers an Ollama-compatible binding so you can serve GPT4All models through the Ollama API.

title: ollama-haystack
summary: Haystack integration providing OllamaGenerator and OllamaEmbedder nodes for building production pipelines.

title: ollama-csharp
summary: Community-maintained C# client for Ollama with async streaming chat and embedding support.

title: ollama-dagger
summary: Dagger module that spins up an Ollama sidecar container for CI pipelines needing local LLM calls.

title: ollama-go
summary: Unofficial but idiomatic Go client for Ollama with context cancellation and streaming support.

title: ollama-nix
summary: Nix derivation that builds Ollama from source with CUDA and ROCm variants for reproducible deployments.

title: ollama-qt
summary: Cross-platform Qt desktop GUI for chatting with Ollama models offline; supports markdown and syntax highlighting.

title: ollama-rust
summary: Lightweight Rust crate providing async bindings to the Ollama REST API with serde types.

title: ollama-obsidian
summary: Obsidian plugin that adds a “Ask Ollama” command to summarize or rewrite selected notes using local models.

title: ollama-mcp
summary: Model-Context-Protocol server exposing Ollama chat & embed functions to any MCP client (e.g., Claude Desktop).
